name: Pamela's PRO Workout
description: Compact programmable clock-synced modulation source with 8 independent outputs. Each output freely configurable as LFO, trigger, envelope, Euclidean pattern, or random. BPM 10–330, with CV inputs and cross-output modulation.

controls.name: Program Knob
controls.description: Push-turn encoder for all UI navigation. Twist to scroll outputs/values, push to select, push+hold to access extended parameters.
controls.detail: Push: select · Twist: adjust · Hold (>1s): extended params

controls.name: Start / Stop Button
controls.description: Starts and stops the master clock. Pressing stop also resets clock position.

inputs.name: CLK
inputs.description: External clock input. Overrides internal BPM when patched. Rising edge 700mV min.

inputs.name: RUN
inputs.description: Run/stop input. High voltage starts clock, low stops it. Can also act as CV 3 or Reset.

inputs.name: CV 1
inputs.description: Assignable CV input 1. Assignable to any output parameter with individual attenuation and offset.

inputs.name: CV 2
inputs.description: Assignable CV input 2. Assignable to any output parameter with individual attenuation and offset.

outputs.name: OUT 1–8
outputs.description: Eight independent clocked CV/gate outputs with LED indicators. Each fully programmable with shape, divisor/multiplier, Euclidean, probability, and cross-modulation.

behaviors.name: Per-Output Clock Division / Multiplication
behaviors.description: Each output has an independent multiplier or divisor from /16384 to ×192 including non-integer triplet and dotted values. Utility modes: GATE (held high), OFF, START pulse, STOP pulse.

behaviors.name: Waveform Shapes
behaviors.description: Each output selects from: Gate/Pulse, Ratchet ×2/×4, Triangle, Trapezoid, Sine, Hump, Exp/Log Envelope, Classic Random (S&H), Smooth Random. Width/Slew parameter shapes each waveform.

behaviors.name: Euclidean Patterns
behaviors.description: Generate Euclidean rhythms per output. Set Steps (total), Triggers (hits), Pad (empty suffix steps), and Shift (rotation). Pattern loops can reset non-4/4 patterns.

behaviors.name: Probability & Loops
behaviors.description: Probability sets % chance each step fires. Loop specifies reset point in beats. Loop Nap/Wake creates sleeping patterns (output off for N loops, active for M loops).

behaviors.name: Cross Operations
behaviors.description: 17 operations between outputs: AND, OR, S&H, MULT, MASK, SEED, FLIP, MIN, MAX, and more. Enables internal modulation routing without cables.

behaviors.name: FLEX Timing
behaviors.description: Micro-timing offsets: HUMAN (random drift), SWING (every-other delay), RAMP UP/DOWN (accelerating/decelerating), HUMP (arc tempo).

behaviors.name: Loop Wake/Nap
behaviors.description: Output plays for N loops (Wake), then silences for N loops (Nap). Creates call-and-response phrases and automatic fills without any external sequencer or logic.

behaviors.name: Quantiser
behaviors.description: Quantises output to musical scales. Custom scales saveable. Applied after cross operations.

behaviors.name: Triggered envelope mode
behaviors.description: Setting an output to Triggered type converts any waveform shape into a one-shot envelope that fires on each rising edge from a CV input. Pamela becomes an 8-channel clocked envelope generator — each channel can have a different shape (exp, log, sine, triangle) and length independent of the master BPM.

behaviors.name: Loop Shift for evolution
behaviors.description: Loop Shift advances the start point of a pattern by N steps each time the loop resets. The pattern slowly walks through a longer underlying sequence cycle by cycle, preventing static repetition over long periods. Combine with Euclidean patterns for sequences that feel generative without true randomness.

behaviors.name: RESEED for controlled randomness
behaviors.description: One output set to Cross Op SEED with Cross Src pointing to another output: the source output's rising edge resets the random seed of the SEED output, causing it to replay the same random sequence from that reset point. Provides deterministic re-rolls on demand — useful for generative patches that need repeatability at phrase boundaries.

patchIdeas.name: Euclidean clave
patchIdeas.patch: Steps=16 · Triggers=7 · Rotate=0 · classic bell pattern · Rotate by 1-2 for Cuban feel
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=7 Rotate=0

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) t> Drum (Trig) // classic clave bell pattern

patchIdeas.name: Internal S&H sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: Smooth Random · Loop=16 · Out B: gate /4 · Out A Cross Op: S&H · Cross Src: Out B · stepped random CV locked to quarter notes · patch Out A to oscillator V/oct for a clocked random melodic sequence with no external S&H module
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Smooth Random, Loop=16, Cross Op S&H, Cross Src OUT 2
* OUT 2: Gate /4

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) p> VCO (V/oct) // stepped random melody on quarter notes

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythm with prime divisions
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: /7 gate · Out B: /11 gate · Out C: /13 gate · LCM = 1001 steps before pattern repeats · run all three to separate drum voices or oscillator triggers · near-infinite rhythmic variation for generative ambient without any randomness
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Gate /7
* OUT 2: Gate /11
* OUT 3: Gate /13

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) g> Drum 1 (Trig)
- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 2) g> Drum 2 (Trig)
- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 3) g> Drum 3 (Trig) // LCM 1001 steps before repeat

patchIdeas.name: Gate masking for ghost notes
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=13 (dense pattern) · Out B: euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=5 (sparse pattern) · Out A Cross Op: MASK · Cross Src: Out B · Out A triggers only fire where Out B pattern allows · dense rhythm filtered down to sparse, syncopated ghost hits
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Euclidean 16/13, Cross Op MASK, Cross Src OUT 2
* OUT 2: Euclidean 16/5

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) t> Drum (Trig) // dense pattern masked to sparse ghost hits

patchIdeas.name: Boolean rhythm logic
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=7 Rotate=0 · Out B: euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=5 Rotate=3 · Out C: gate /1 · Out C Cross Op: AND · Cross Src: Out A · Out C fires only where both Out A and Out B coincide · sparse, syncopated intersections that shift with rotations
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Euclidean 16/7 Rotate=0
* OUT 2: Euclidean 16/5 Rotate=3
* OUT 3: Gate /1, Cross Op AND, Cross Src OUT 1

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 3) t> Drum (Trig) // fires only where OUT 1 AND OUT 2 coincide

patchIdeas.name: Wake/Nap call-and-response
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: melody CV source · Loop=4 · Wake=2 · Nap=1 · Out A plays two phrases then rests for one loop · Out B answers in the gap: Loop=4 · Wake=1 · Nap=2 · plays only while Out A rests · natural musical breathing and dialogue between two voices with no manual muting
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Melody CV, Loop=4, Wake=2, Nap=1
* OUT 2: Melody CV, Loop=4, Wake=1, Nap=2

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/oct) // call
- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/oct) // response in the gap

patchIdeas.name: Drum fill every 8 bars
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: main drum trigger running continuously · Out B: fill trigger (Steps=16 Triggers=12) · Out B Loop=8 · Wake=1 · Nap=7 · Out B is silent for 7 bars then fires on bar 8 only · automatic periodic fills locked to musical phrase length
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Main drum trigger, continuous
* OUT 2: Euclidean 16/12, Loop=8, Wake=1, Nap=7

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 2) t> Fill Drum (Trig) // fires only on bar 8

patchIdeas.name: Smooth random portamento
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: Smooth Random · Rate multiplier ×4 · Loop=8 · Quantize=pentatonic · Out A → oscillator V/oct · gliding voltage snaps to scale degrees with portamento preserved between quantize steps · melodic random with no harsh jumps
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Smooth Random, rate x4, Loop=8, Quantize=pentatonic

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) p> VCO (V/oct) // gliding pentatonic melody

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature sine pair
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: sine LFO · rate /4 · Out B: sine LFO same rate · Phase=90 on Out B · patch Out A and Out B to X/Y inputs of a Lissajous-capable scope or to two VCA/filter parameters · creates circular modulation paths, rotating stereo effects, or smooth 2D parameter sweeps
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Sine LFO /4
* OUT 2: Sine LFO /4, Phase=90

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) >> VCA L (CV)
- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 2) >> VCA R (CV) // quadrature rotating stereo

patchIdeas.name: FLEX humanized hi-hat
patchIdeas.patch: Out A: euclidean Steps=16 Triggers=12 · FLEX Op: HUMAN · FLEX Amount: 15% · patch Out A to closed hi-hat trigger · subtle random micro-timing drift on every hit · sounds like a real drummer playing a repetitive pattern rather than a machine — increase Amount to 30-40% for obvious drunk-drummer feel
patchIdeas.diagram:
Pamela's PRO Workout:
* OUT 1: Euclidean 16/12, FLEX HUMAN 15%

- Pamela's PRO Workout (OUT 1) t> Hi-Hat (Trig) // micro-timing drift per hit
